title:
AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN JOAQUIN HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF
SAN JOAQUIN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO DON FELIX SERRA MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1256 / 67 OG No. 37, 7237 (September 13, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6206, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN JOAQUIN HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF

SAN JOAQUIN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO DON FELIX SERRA MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the San Joaquin High School in the Municipality of San Joaquin, Province of Iloilo, is hereby changed to Don Felix Serra Memorial High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
